title: Dasha Defano

'''Dasha Defano''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]]. An accomplished flier, Defano was a member of a Wroonian [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Unidentified Wroonian privateer band|gang]] before leaving the group after the destruction of a [[Unidentified civilian transport|civilian transport]] during a raid. She joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and flew [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]]. Defano continued to serve with the [[Alliance Military/Legends|military]] when the Alliance became the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and was part of the [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|task force]] charged with the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the planet [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].

Following the flight of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]—[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the sector—from Kal'Shebbol, Defano was transferred to the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] had been assigned to [[DarkStryder Campaign|track down]] the rogue Imperial and neutralize any threat he posed to the stability of the region. Defano served as part of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[FarStar starfighter squadron|complement]] aboard the ''FarStar'' for several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] and participated in several missions, including the [[Battle of Kathol System|Battle of Kathol]], which saw the eventual defeat of Moff Sarne and his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]].

==Biography==
===Early career===
Born on [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] Dasha Defano began her [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] career as a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]], operating with a [[Unidentified Wroonian privateer band|band]] of fellow Wroonians who raided both [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] shipping. During her [[Time/Legends|time]] with the group, Defano was forced to destroy a [[Unidentified civilian transport|civilian transport]] that the group was attacking to stop it from sending out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]]. Sometime later, she discovered that one of her [[Dasha Defano's friend|best friends]] from Wroona was aboard the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] at the time of its destruction, and that she herself was partly responsible for her [[Death/Legends|death]]. Ashamed, Defano left the privateers and rarely spoke of her time with them. Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Defano joined the Rebel Alliance as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot and flew [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]]. She continued to serve with the Alliance once it transitioned into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was assigned to the [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|task force]] sent to [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberate]] the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].<ref name="tdc" />

===Service aboard the ''FarStar''===
Following the liberation of Kal'Shebbol, Defano was transferred to the [[FarStar starfighter squadron|starfighter complement]] aboard the modified [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', where she served as both a pilot<ref name="tdc" /> and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|178|Defano, Dasha}}</ref> The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] had been assigned to [[DarkStryder Campaign|track down]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], the Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who ruled the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Sarne had fled the planet with the majority of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] after the fall of his sector capital, and the New Republic wanted to neutralize any threat he posed to the region.<ref name="tdc" /> Defano participated fully in shipboard life during the ''FarStar''{{'s}} months-long mission and even entered a gunnery competition in an effort to win an extended shore leave pass shortly after the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] left the planet [[Binaros]].<ref name="pf">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Plant Food|book=The Kathol Outback}}</ref>

During her time on the ''FarStar'', Defano developed a close friendship with the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] leader, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ranna Gorjaye]].<ref name="tdc" /> The two women spent much of their off-duty time playing [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]. However, as Gorjaye and the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], resolved their professional differences—Gorjaye did not believe that Adrimetrum, a former [[Commando/Legends|commando]], was qualified to lead the mission—and began to work closely together, Defano began to feel detached from her friend.<ref name="kr">''[[The Kathol Rift]]''</ref>

As a result, Defano befriended the Human and fellow crewmate [[Thanis Gul-Rah]], a former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. It was not a romantic relationship, and Gul-Rah claimed he wanted someone to talk to since [[Scoryn]], the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]]<ref name="kr" /> following the defection of the previous executive officer, [[Gorak Khzam]],<ref name="w">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Wildfire (adventure)|book=The Kathol Outback}}</ref> was using her position to settle an old score between the two of them. Defano found Scoryn's actions distasteful, which was Gul-Rah's intention: he was trying to sow discord between Scoryn and the fighter pilots to give him an advantage in any confrontation that came about between the two of them.<ref name="kr" />

[[File:FarStar_Xwing.jpg|thumb|left|180px|An X-wing assigned to the ''FarStar'']]
Several months after leaving Kal'Shebbol, the ''FarStar'' traveled though the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]], an [[Nebula/Legends|expanse of volatile gases]] interspersed with severe [[lightstorm]]s. After a stop at the planet [[Q'Maere]] within the Rift, the ''FarStar'' took aboard several former [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] from the [[Q'Maere Research Facility]]. The installation had been Sarne's secret [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and reeducation center, and many of the inmates had been unfairly imprisoned, [[Torture/Legends|tortured]], and abused.<ref name="hw">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Harm's Way|book=The Kathol Rift}}</ref> Days after leaving Q'Maere, the leader of the former prisoners, [[Lowen Chase]], led a mutiny to take control of the ship. Defano remained loyal to Captain Adrimetrum and assisted in the effort to reclaim the vessel from the mutineers,<ref name="re">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Rogue Elements|book=The Kathol Rift}}</ref> but her friend, Gul-Rah, was on the opposite side.<ref name="e">''[[Endgame]]''</ref> Despite their actions, the mutineers were not put off the ship—the ''FarStar''{{'s}} crew requirements meant that every available hand was required to man the vessel. As such, the mutineers were allowed to remain aboard, albeit it with restrictions to their personal freedoms.<ref name="re" />

After they passed through the Rift, Defano became increasingly aware that the ''FarStar'' was about to engage in a major battle against Sarne's forces. Although she was confident in her own abilities, she realized that if anything was to happen to Gorjaye, she would be next in line to command the corvette's fighter squadron. Her apprehension for the coming battle was not helped by Gul-Rah. Her trust in him had been shaken since the mutiny and his betrayal of Adrimetrum, but despite that his view of the command staff had begun to rub off on Defano. The young pilot found herself not agreeing with Adrimetrum as much as she had in the past due to his influence. In her capacity as a pilot, Defano fought in the [[Battle of Kathol System|Battle of Kathol]], an engagement that saw the final defeat of Moff Kentor Sarne.<ref name="e" />

==Personality and traits==
Dasha Defano had [[blue]] skin and long, wavy blue [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. She was an extremely confident woman and an excellent pilot. Not at all shy, she did not mind telling anyone just how good she was. However, due to her shame over the death of her best friend during her privateer days, she rarely boasted of her actions in their service and preferred instead to speak of her time flying for the New Republic. A trained pilot, Defano could also drive [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, [[Astrogation/Legends|navigate]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and operate the weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] on starships. She was trained to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="tdc" />

Easy-going and friendly, Defano could often be found near the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay of the ''FarStar'', talking with the [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and other pilots. Although she appeared to get on with all the members of the crew, she harbored a distrust of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] gunner [[Krudar]]. Her misgivings stemmed from the fact that a [[Unidentified Duros (privateer)|Duros]] had served aboard the same privateer vessel as she, and she held the belief that any Duros knew of her past. Accordingly, she avoided Krudar whenever possible.<ref name="tdc" /> Defano also had a soft spot for the downtrodden, and, as a result, a friendship developed between her and Thanis Gul-Rah. Although not a romantic relationship, the possibility that it could have turned into one was present.<ref name="kr" />

Defano was a practical woman and constantly carried a gear bag with her wherever she went, even stowing it in the compartment of any starfighter she piloted. The bag contained several personal and survival items, including a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]], [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]], [[Ration pack/Legends|ration pack]], [[Glowrod/Legends|glowrod]], emergency [[Flare/Legends|flare]], a [[Knife/Legends|knife]], and a [[Hologram/Legends|holo-image]] of the friend who died on the transport she destroyed.<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dasha Defano was created for ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', which was published in [[1995]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', as a member of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} crew. Her biography was featured in the "Support Crew" section of the publication, written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]]. The illustration of Defano that accompanied the entry was drawn by [[Mike Vilardi]]. She was subsequently mentioned in all three accompanying supplements, ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'', ''[[The Kathol Rift]]'', and ''[[Endgame]]''. She later received an entry in the ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]].

As a member of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} starfighter complement, it can be assumed that Defano fought in all battles where the corvette deployed its fighter squadron. However, due to the nature of the [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] scenarios found in ''The DarkStryder Campaign'', she is only explicitly mentioned to have participated in the Battle of Kathol.
